kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=backend, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Name
kw.doc: :example: 'John Doe'

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/client path_url=/client headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '71', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "Liz Costa", "cpf": "192.807.435-97", "policy": "Seguro Auto"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Name
kw.doc: :example: 'John Doe'

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${json} = {'error': 'REQUIRED_FIELDS', 'message': 'Preencha todos os campos obrigatórios do registro SRO'}
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.name: Validar Campos Obrigatorios API

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=backend, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Emitir Policy Sem Campos
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/policy path_url=/policy headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '2', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${json} = {'error': 'REQUIRED_FIELDS', 'message': 'Preencha todos os campos obrigatórios do registro SRO'}
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.msg: Preencha todos os campos obrigatórios do registro SRO != Preencha os campos obrigatórios
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
kw.status: Preencha todos os campos obrigatórios do registro SRO != Preencha os campos obrigatórios
Preencha todos os campos obrigatórios do registro SRO != Preencha os campos obrigatórios

test.status: Preencha todos os campos obrigatórios do registro SRO != Preencha os campos obrigatórios
